title: Portfolio Case Studies and Technical Decision Narratives · Opportunity Brief: Case Study Access
summary: A project page celebrates features and tools but omits the user need, personal decisions, alternatives, failures, verification, accessibility, security, impact limits, and maintenance state. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the case study access increment in evidence-linked project case-study set. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice…
objectives: Provide keyboard-operable, reflowing, structured, concise, low-motion, text-equivalent case evidence with a usable offline alternative.
Connect accessibility, security, privacy, testing, operations, and recovery claims to exact automated and human evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Case Study Access · Theory Case Study Access
steps.instruction:
theory case — A polished project story lists features and tools but invents user impact, hides failures, and links no accessibility, security, changed-case, or operations evidence. The theory variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Case Study Access contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Case Study Access · Theory Case Study Access.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for provide keyboard-operable, reflowing, structured, concise, low-motion, text-equivalent case evidence with a usable offline alternative. For Predict Case Study Access · Theory Case Study Access, keep Case Study Access connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A polished project story lists features and tools but invents user impact, hides failures, and links no accessibility, security, changed-case, or operations evidence. The theory variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Case Study Access condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: NACE Career Readiness Competencies — Controls observable evidence for career and self-development, communication, critical thinking, equity and inclusion, leadership, professionalism, teamwork, and technology.

hints: For Predict Case Study Access · Theory Case Study Access, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Case Study Access precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Predict Case Study Access · Theory Case Study Access, trace this concrete input and predict targeting, source, evidence, contribution, access, privacy, consent, process, decision, rejection, repair, follow-up, and learner-controlled transfer evidence before reviewing it: A polished project story lists features and tools but invents user impact, hides failures, and links no accessibility, security, changed-case, or operations evidence. The theory variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

For Predict Case Study Access · Theory Case Study Access, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: Portfolio accessibility matters only for design roles.

options.text: Provide keyboard-operable, reflowing, structured, concise, low-motion, text-equivalent case evidence with a usable offline alternative. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.
Portfolio accessibility matters only for design roles. That claim fails the predict case study access evidence boundary for Case Study Access.

For predict case study access, apply Case Study Access without its stated preconditions, omit the evidence-linked project case-study set trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Case Study Access for evidence-linked project case-study set.

steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for provide keyboard-operable, reflowing, structured, concise, low-motion, text-equivalent case evidence with a usable offline alternative. content.text: Provide keyboard-operable, reflowing, structured, concise, low-motion, text-equivalent case evidence with a usable offline alternative. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Case Study Access while producing evidence-linked project case-study set.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A polished project story lists features and tools but invents user impact, hides failures, and links no accessibility, security, changed-case, or operations evidence. The worked example variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Provide keyboard-operable, reflowing, structured, concise, low-motion, text-equivalent case evidence with a usable offline alternative. A defensible solution applies Case Study Access, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to evidence-linked project case-study set.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-case-study-access — Provide keyboard-operable, reflowing, structured, concise, low-motion, text-equivalent case evidence with a usable offline alternative.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-4
focus: career-case-study-access
decision-evidence: Provide keyboard-operable, reflowing, structured, concise, low-motion, text-equivalent case evidence with a usable offline alternative.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Portfolio accessibility matters only for design roles. This fails the Case Study Access contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: NACE Career Readiness Competencies (Current eight-competency framework reviewed 2026-07-15) — Controls observable evidence for career and self-development, communication, critical thinking, equity and inclusion, leadership, professionalism, teamwork, and technology.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Provide keyboard-operable, reflowing, structured, concise, low-motion, text-equivalent case evidence with a usable offline alternative.
